## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR does and why.

---

## Type of Change

Select the type that best describes this PR:

- [ ] Add a new tool
- [ ] Update existing tool information
- [ ] Fix a broken link
- [ ] Fix a typo or formatting issue
- [ ] Add or update documentation
- [ ] Other (describe below)

---

## Tool Entry (if applicable)

If this PR adds or updates a tool, paste the entry here exactly as it
appears in the README so reviewers can check the format at a glance:

```markdown
**[Tool Name](https://tool-website.com/)** ⭐⭐⭐⭐ 💰

- **What it does**: ...
- **Best for**: ...
- **Features**: ...
- **Pricing**: ...
- **Unique**: ...
```

---

## Checklist

Go through each item before submitting. PRs that skip this checklist
will be asked to complete it before review begins.

**Format**

- [ ] Entry follows the format defined in CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] All required fields are present: `What it does`, `Best for`, `Features`
- [ ] Star rating is between 2 and 5 stars
- [ ] Badge icons are from the approved set: 💰 💵 🔄 🚀 🏢

**Content**

- [ ] Tool is actively maintained (recent commits or releases)
- [ ] Tool is directly relevant to LLM development or deployment
- [ ] Descriptions are accurate and written in neutral language
- [ ] Pricing information is current (verified within the last 30 days)

**Links**

- [ ] Tool URL is reachable and points to the official source
- [ ] No redirects or shortened URLs used

**Placement**

- [ ] Tool is added to the correct category
- [ ] Tool is not already listed elsewhere in the README

---

## Additional Context

Add any other information that would help reviewers understand this PR.
For example: why you chose this rating, how you verified the tool works,
or why it belongs in a specific category rather than another.
